title: H&S Jute String - 2 Reels x 90m (300ft) 3mm (0.1") Garden Twine - 6 ply Thick Strong Rope Roll - Floristry, Gift, Parcel, Butcher, or Crafts - Natural Brown Gardening Sisal Rope
features: Natural: This garden string twine is made from natural fibres and is perfect for floristry, crafting, and gardening.
Strong 6-Ply Construction: With 3mm (0.1") thickness and 6-ply strength, this twine is more durable than typical 3-ply options, ensuring it handles heavier tasks with ease.
Rustic Natural Look: Our garden twine heavy duty has an earthy, rustic appearance that enhances aesthetic of gift wrapping, floristry, and other crafts.
Multi-Purpose Use: Our thin rope is great for arts, crafts, floristry, and gardening, it provides secure support for plants and can be reused multiple times.
Extra-Long Length: Each package includes two reels of craft string twine, offering a total of 600 feet (183 meters) for extended crafting and gardening projects.
description: LOOKING FOR STRONG AND VERSATILE JUTE TWINE? This 6-ply jute twine string is the perfect solution for your crafting, gardening, and floristry needs. With a thicker, more durable design, it's stronger than traditional 3-ply twine, ensuring secure wrapping and reliable plant support. Its natural rustic appearance adds an earthy touch to any project, while the 600-foot length (183 meters) provides plenty of material for repeated use across a variety of tasks. Highlights: Strong 6-ply construction Rustic, natural appearance Reusable 600 feet total length SPECIFICATIONS - 180m (600ft) length in total - 2 x 90m (300ft) rolls - 3mm (0.1") thick - 6ply Product Info 2 x Rolls of Jute Twine
